description: Completed direct-provider debt retirements. Entries remain linked to the immutable audit baseline.

entries.reason: The legacy server fallback caller to mcp-day-8b3 was removed after the authenticated Gateway result/add cutover was verified. Direct internal fallback now fails closed instead of restoring the retired Edge hop.
The public mcp-day-8b3 and mcp-day-followup mutation implementations were replaced by credential-free HTTP 410 retirement stubs after canonical backend cutover.
